title: SessionReview
description: A post-session learning review that summarises an AgentSession and links to the MemoryEntries extracted from it.

specVersion.description: Spec version of this document, e.g. "2.0.0".

sessionRef.description: URN of the AgentSession being reviewed. Pattern: urn:srcos:session:<id>

summaryRef.description: Reference to the summary artifact produced by this review.

learnedMemoryRefs.description: URNs of MemoryEntries extracted and persisted from this session. Pattern: urn:srcos:memory:<id>

followupRefs.description: References to follow-up tasks or sessions spawned by this review.

reviewedAt.description: ISO 8601 date-time when this review was conducted.
